allow:
Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python -c "
from app.config import ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, MAX_TOKENS, MODEL_NAME, ALLOWED_ORIGINS
print\(f'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: {\\"set\\" if ANTHROPIC_API_KEY else \\"not set\\"} \(from .env\)'\)
print\(f'MAX_TOKENS: {MAX_TOKENS}'\)
print\(f'MODEL_NAME: {MODEL_NAME}'\)
print\(f'ALLOWED_ORIGINS: {ALLOWED_ORIGINS}'\)
")
Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python -c "from main import app; print\('Routes:', [r.path for r in app.routes]\)")
